us-politics.headline: Shooting Erupts at White House Correspondents' Dinner
us-politics.body:
A shooting incident at the Washington Hilton Saturday night forced an evacuation of the annual White House Correspondents' Dinner, sending high-profile guests scrambling for safety. The suspect - a 31-year-old California man - was quickly apprehended after opening fire, with law enforcement confirming multiple weapons were involved.

President Trump, who was present at the event, was swiftly removed from the scene. Secret Service and local police responded immediately, with D.C. interim police chief Jeffery Carroll stating the suspect was armed with both a shotgun and a handgun. The incident has reignited discussions about security at high-profile political gatherings.

sources.title: Live updates: Officials identify suspect in White House correspondents’ dinner shooting
Correspondents’ dinner chaos hits high-profile guests already marked by political violence
Shooting suspect identified as 31-year-old man from California, three officials say
U.S. Secret Service Director Sean Curran defended the security setup at the event, and said the...
Interim D.C. police chief Jeffery Carroll said during a news conference that law enforcement believes the...
D.C. interim police chief Jeffery Carroll said the suspect was armed with a shotgun, a handgun...

us-politics.headline: Political Reactions Divide Along Partisan Lines After Shooting
us-politics.body:
Political leaders and media figures responded dramatically to the White House Correspondents' Dinner shooting, with perspectives sharply split. Trump characterized the incident as reflective of his political impact, while calling for increased security measures like a protective ballroom for future events.

Right-wing media emphasized security lapses, with Fox News highlighting that Secret Service personnel remain unpaid due to ongoing budget disputes. Left-leaning outlets focused on the potential broader implications for political discourse and event safety. The suspect is expected to appear in court Monday, with prosecutors indicating multiple charges are likely.

sources.title: Trump says he sees shootings as a reflection of his impact
Trump says he sees shootings as a reflection of his impact
Trump says WHCD shooting highlights need for ballroom
Trump allies, world leaders react to WHCD shooting
Blanche says charges imminent in Washington Hilton shooting
Secret Service in line of fire at WHCA shooting still unpaid due to Dem-led shutdown

au-politics.headline: Immigration Rhetoric Sparks Controversy at Anzac Day Events
au-politics.body:
Senior Coalition politicians have drawn criticism for inflammatory comments about immigration and diversity during Anzac Day commemorations. Senator Matt Canavan addressed an anti-immigration rally, claiming there was too much discussion of diversity. Meanwhile, Opposition frontbencher Angus Taylor suggested a higher risk of dangerous people entering Australia from certain countries.

The comments created tension at memorial events. In Queensland, the state premier's Anzac event notably omitted an Acknowledgement of Country - a protocol typically recognizing Indigenous Australian connections to land. Police in Perth proactively blocked members of an anti-immigration group from attending a dawn service after previous disruptions in eastern states.

sources.title: Australia news live: Canavan says ‘too much talk of diversity’ in address to Canberra anti-immigration rally
No Acknowledgement of Country at Anzac event attended by Qld premier
Taylor says higher risk of ‘bad people coming from bad countries’ and that welcome to country ceremonies ‘overused’
Police blocked members of anti-immigration group from Perth dawn service after Anzac Day booing in eastern states

au-politics.headline: Victoria Offers Car Registration Discount to Ease Cost of Living
au-politics.body:
The Victorian government has announced a 20% car registration discount as part of its cost-of-living relief strategy. The measure aims to provide financial support to vehicle owners struggling with ongoing economic pressures.

The rebate represents a direct intervention to help residents manage household expenses. It follows ongoing discussions about economic challenges facing Australian families, with various states exploring targeted relief measures to address rising living costs.

sources.title: Victoria offers 20pc car rego discount in cost-of-living measure
One industry rules the roost in WA and neither side of politics can ignore it

world.headline: Shots Fired at White House Correspondents' Dinner - Trump Evacuated
world.body: A shooting incident disrupted the annual White House Correspondents' Dinner, forcing President Trump's immediate evacuation. Law enforcement quickly secured the venue and took a suspect into custody. Details remain limited, but initial reports suggest the president was unharmed during the dramatic incident.

sources.title: Trump confirms officer shot at White House Correspondents’ gala

Dramatic scenes as Trump rushed from White House gala
Trump unhurt after shots fired at White House correspondents’ dinner

world.headline: US-Iran Tensions Escalate as Peace Talks Collapse
world.body: Diplomatic efforts between the United States and Iran have collapsed, with Trump canceling planned envoy trips to Pakistan. Hundreds of Israelis rallied in response to stalling negotiations, signaling deepening regional tensions. Iran has rejected talks, projecting a hardened stance that threatens to further destabilize diplomatic relations.

sources.title: Hundreds of Israelis rally as US-Iran peace talks stall
Iran war live: Tehran rejects talks under siege, Trump cancels envoys’ trip
Trump cancels US envoys' trip to Pakistan for talks on Iran war
Trump puts onus on Iran’s authorities as they project hardened stance
Trump cancels US envoys’ trip after Iran’s Araghchi leaves Pakistan

world.headline: Violence Strikes Colombia - Bus Bombing and Regional Explosion
world.body: Colombia faces multiple security challenges after a deadly bus bombing attributed to dissident FARC rebels. In a separate incident, an explosion in southwest Colombia killed at least 14 people. The attacks underscore ongoing security challenges in the region and the persistent threat of armed groups.

sources.title: Video: Colombia blames dissident FARC rebel for deadly bus bomb
Explosion in southwest Colombia kills at least 14, state governor says

ai.headline: AI Agents Set to Revolutionize Digital Commerce
ai.body:
Anthropic has launched a groundbreaking test marketplace for autonomous agent-to-agent transactions, signaling a potential paradigm shift in how digital services interact. The platform could transform everything from software procurement to complex service negotiations - without human intervention.

This development comes amid growing interest in AI's commercial potential. An amateur mathematician recently demonstrated AI's problem-solving capabilities by using ChatGPT to tackle a 60-year-old mathematical challenge, further highlighting the technology's expanding horizons.

sources.title: Anthropic created a test marketplace for agent-on-agent commerce
Amateur armed with ChatGPT solves an Erdős problem
Simulacrum of Knowledge Work

ai.headline: Tech Giants Reshape Landscape Through Mergers and Strategic Shifts
ai.body:
Cohere's merger with Aleph Alpha underscores the ongoing consolidation in AI technology, as companies seek competitive advantages through strategic partnerships. The move reflects the intense global race to develop more sophisticated AI capabilities.

In parallel, Apple is navigating a critical transition under new leadership. With Johnny Ternus at the helm, the company is reportedly reassessing its hardware strategy - a pivotal moment for one of tech's most influential players. Tokyo has emerged as a key innovation hub, further complicating the global technological ecosystem.

sources.title: Why Cohere is merging with Aleph Alpha
Why Tokyo is the most important tech destination of 2026
Apple under Ternus: what comes next for the tech giant’s hardware strategy

ai.headline: Privacy Concerns Escalate with EU Digital Identity Proposals
ai.body:
The European Union's proposed age verification systems are raising alarm among digital privacy advocates. Critics argue the initiative could serve as a Trojan horse for broader digital identification infrastructure, potentially compromising individual privacy rights.

Security challenges continue to plague tech platforms. Discord users recently gained unauthorized access to Anthropic's Mythos system, while reports of mysterious app installations on personal devices highlight the ongoing vulnerabilities in digital ecosystems.

sources.title: EU Age Control: The trojan horse for digital IDs
Tell HN: An app is silently installing itself on my iPhone every day
Discord Sleuths Gained Unauthorized Access to Anthropic’s Mythos

btc.headline: BlackRock Bitcoin ETF Crosses Major Investor Threshold
btc.body:
BlackRock's spot Bitcoin ETF has surged past a critical milestone - attracting massive institutional investment that signals mainstream financial acceptance. The fund has rapidly accumulated billions in assets, demonstrating Wall Street's growing confidence in Bitcoin as a legitimate investment vehicle.

This breakthrough represents more than just a financial product launch. It marks a pivotal moment where traditional finance fully embraces cryptocurrency, transforming Bitcoin from a fringe asset to a recognized portfolio component for institutional investors.

sources.title: BlackRock’s bitcoin ETF just hit a massive milestone that proves crypto is now a mainstream bet

btc.headline: US Military Bitcoin Analysis Sparks Community Skepticism
btc.body:
Bitcoin community members have publicly challenged the US military's understanding of the cryptocurrency network, highlighting ongoing tensions between decentralized technology advocates and government institutions. The criticism suggests a fundamental disconnect in how institutional actors perceive Bitcoin's technical architecture and operational dynamics.

This dispute underscores the persistent ideological divide between Bitcoin's grassroots supporters and traditional power structures - a tension that continues to define the cryptocurrency's complex relationship with established systems.

sources.title: Bitcoiners cast doubt on the US military's understanding of the network
